signals.headline: Ethereum Throughput Milestone Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ethereum Throughput Milestone Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ethereum's ecosystem has just hit a record throughput of ~75,862 transactions per second, driven by MegaETH, Lighter, Arbitrum, Base, and Polygon PoS, as reported by growthepie and Joseph Young—this could boost sentiment on Ethereum's scalability and positively shift prediction markets like those on Polymarket for ETH price moveme
